news.title: Wien hat seine erste Kölsch-Bar - DiePresse.com
news.summary:
# Vienna Gets Its First Kölsch Bar

Vienna now has its first dedicated Kölsch bar, offering the traditional German beer style from Cologne that was previously unavailable in the city. The specific bar name isn't mentioned in the snippet provided, but this is notable for Vienna's beer culture. Visitors interested in German beer traditions or looking for authentic Kölsch (a light, refreshing ale) now have a dedicated spot to experience this regional specialty that was missing from Vienna's beer scene.
